parameters.command: =tmp="/tmp/side-brain-capture-{{ $json.requestId }}.json"; printf '%s' '{{ $json.payloadBase64 }}' | base64 -d > "$tmp"; /home/tianchi/ai-side-brain/.venv/bin/python /home/tianchi/ai-side-brain/scripts/capture.py import-json "$tmp"; status=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $status

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Captured to Side-Brain', output: $json.stdout || '' } }}
